# Cider UI

> Apple-aesthetic UI components as a Tailwind CSS v4 plugin. Semantic class names, no utility soup. Pure CSS with optional vanilla JS for interactive components. No framework required.

## Getting Started

- [Home](https://ciderui.com/index.html): Overview of Cider UI ‚Äî semantic classes, dark mode, ~12 KB CSS + ~5 KB JS gzipped.
- [Installation](https://ciderui.com/installation.html): CDN, npm/pnpm/bun/yarn, ES module imports, dark mode setup.

## Components

### Form & Input

- [Button](https://ciderui.com/components/button.html): `btn-filled` `btn-tinted` `btn-plain` `btn-gray` `btn-destructive` `btn-capsule` `btn-small` `btn-large`.
- [Checkbox](https://ciderui.com/components/checkbox.html): `input[type="checkbox"]` ‚Äî pure CSS checkbox styling.
- [Input](https://ciderui.com/components/input.html): `input` ‚Äî styled text input.
- [Verification Code](https://ciderui.com/components/verification-code.html): Verification code input with auto-advance. Requires `js/verification-code.js`.
- [Radio Group](https://ciderui.com/components/radio-group.html): `input[type="radio"]` ‚Äî pure CSS radio styling.
- [Select](https://ciderui.com/components/select.html): Native `<select>` styling.
- [Slider](https://ciderui.com/components/slider.html): `slider` ‚Äî styled range input.
- [Stepper](https://ciderui.com/components/stepper.html): `stepper` ‚Äî increment/decrement control. Requires `js/stepper.js`.
- [Switch](https://ciderui.com/components/switch.html): `input[role="switch"]` ‚Äî pure CSS toggle switch.
- [Textarea](https://ciderui.com/components/textarea.html): `textarea` ‚Äî styled textarea.

### Layout

- [Essentials](https://ciderui.com/components/essentials.html): `.cider` ‚Äî auto-style native HTML elements (buttons, inputs, tables, typography). No layout opinion, pure styling hook. Add `.cider-fixed` alongside `.cider` for centered responsive max-width breakpoints.

### Navigation

- [Breadcrumb](https://ciderui.com/components/breadcrumb.html): `breadcrumb` ‚Äî breadcrumb navigation with separator arrows.
- [Card](https://ciderui.com/components/card.html): `card` ‚Äî simple padded container.
- [Navigation Bar](https://ciderui.com/components/navbar.html): `navbar` `navbar-title` `navbar-back` `navbar-actions` ‚Äî iOS-style top navigation bar.
- [Page Control](https://ciderui.com/components/page-control.html): `page-control` ‚Äî Apple-style dot page indicator.
- [Pagination](https://ciderui.com/components/pagination.html): `pagination` ‚Äî page navigation buttons.
- [Separator](https://ciderui.com/components/separator.html): Classless `<hr>` for horizontal dividers; `.separator-vertical`, `.separator-label` for variants.
- [Segmented Control](https://ciderui.com/components/segmented-control.html): `segmented-control` ‚Äî tabbed segment selector. Requires `js/tabs.js`.
- [Tab Bar](https://ciderui.com/components/tab-bar.html): `tab-bar` ‚Äî iOS-style bottom navigation with icon and label items.
- [Toolbar](https://ciderui.com/components/toolbar.html): `toolbar` `toolbar-group` `toolbar-spacer` `toolbar-title` ‚Äî macOS-style grouped action bar.

### Overlays & Dialogs

- [Action Sheet](https://ciderui.com/components/action-sheet.html): `action-sheet` `action-sheet-group` ‚Äî iOS-style bottom sheet for contextual actions. Requires `js/action-sheet.js`.
- [Dialog](https://ciderui.com/components/dialog.html): `dialog` with `header`, `section`, `footer`. Alerts and form dialogs. Optional `js/dialog.js`.
- [Popover](https://ciderui.com/components/popover.html): Click-triggered floating content. Requires `js/popover.js`.

### Feedback & Status

- [Activity Indicator](https://ciderui.com/components/activity-indicator.html): `activity-indicator` `activity-indicator-sm` `activity-indicator-md` `activity-indicator-lg` ‚Äî Apple-style loading indicator.
- [Badge](https://ciderui.com/components/badge.html): `badge` ‚Äî red notification count.
- [Callout](https://ciderui.com/components/callout.html): `callout` ‚Äî informational callout box.
- [Gauge](https://ciderui.com/components/gauge.html): `gauge` `gauge-sm` `gauge-lg` `gauge-green` `gauge-orange` `gauge-destructive` ‚Äî circular ring progress indicator.
- [Help Tag](https://ciderui.com/components/help-tag.html): `[data-help]` ‚Äî hover tooltip on any element. Pure CSS, no JS.
- [HUD](https://ciderui.com/components/hud.html): `hud` `hud-container`. Requires `js/hud.js`.
- [Progress](https://ciderui.com/components/progress.html): `<progress>` `.progress-indeterminate`

### Display & Media

- [Avatar](https://ciderui.com/components/avatar.html): `avatar` `avatar-sm` `avatar-lg` `avatar-xl` `avatar-group` ‚Äî use Tailwind `size-*` and `text-*` for custom sizes.
- [Kbd](https://ciderui.com/components/kbd.html): `kbd` ‚Äî keyboard shortcut styling with macOS, Windows, and Linux shortcut examples.
- [List](https://ciderui.com/components/list.html): List with auto-styled rows. `list` ‚Äî children get icon, content, action styling via structural selectors.
- [Table](https://ciderui.com/components/table.html): `table` `table-striped` ‚Äî styled tables.
- [Picker](https://ciderui.com/components/picker.html): `picker` `picker-column` `picker-item` ‚Äî iOS-style scroll wheel picker. Requires `js/picker.js`.
- [Tag](https://ciderui.com/components/tag.html): `tag` ‚Äî small label for categorisation.

## Quick Start

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "ciderui";
```

All styles require a `.cider` ancestor ‚Äî both classless elements and component classes are inside `@scope(.cider)`.

```html
<body class="cider">
  <h1>Auto-styled heading</h1>
  <button class="btn-filled">Click me</button>
</body>
```

## Dark Mode

Add `class="dark"` to `<html>`. All components adapt automatically via CSS variables.

## Interactive Components (Optional)

Most components are pure CSS. Import JS only for interactive behavior:

```js
import "ciderui/dialog.js";
import "ciderui/action-sheet.js";
import "ciderui/tabs.js";
import "ciderui/hud.js";
import "ciderui/popover.js";
import "ciderui/slider.js";
import "ciderui/stepper.js";
import "ciderui/picker.js";
import "ciderui/verification-code.js";
```
